page.primary_keyword: New Year's Eve 2028 Marbella yacht fireworks
page.title: New Year's Eve 2028 Marbella: Yacht Charter with Fireworks Views

data.meta_description: Book a New Year's Eve 2028 Marbella yacht charter for prime fireworks views. Depart Puerto Banús from €749/2h. Licensed skipper, drinks, snacks included.
data.summary: Celebrate New Year's Eve 2028 on the water in Marbella with a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Watch the midnight fireworks over the Mediterranean with drinks, snacks, and a skipper included.
key_facts: Charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella, with views of the 2028 NYE fireworks
Prices from €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39) up to €4,719 minimum 4h (Mangusta 80)
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA
Fleet ranges from 6.4m speedboats (5 pax) to 29m superyachts (12 pax)
Book early: NYE slots fill weeks in advance; contact via WhatsApp for availability
Fireworks displays visible from the bay near Puerto Banús and Marbella Marina

faq.q: What is the best yacht for New Year's Eve 2028 in Marbella?
faq.a: For a small group, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) offer great value from €749/2h. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski and costs €4,719 for 4 hours. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Do you see the fireworks from the yacht?
faq.a: Yes. The midnight fireworks over Marbella's coastline are clearly visible from the bay near Puerto Banús. Your skipper will anchor in a prime spot for unobstructed views of the display.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for New Year's Eve 2028?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp (link on our site) to check availability and get a quote. We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance as NYE slots sell out quickly.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food or decorations?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and decorations. The yacht has a cooler and table space. Just let us know in advance so we can prepare.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on New Year's Eve?
faq.a: Safety comes first. If conditions are unsafe, we will offer a full refund or reschedule to another date. We monitor forecasts closely and inform you 24–48 hours before.

faq.q: Is there a minimum age for children on the yacht?
faq.a: No minimum age, but children must be accompanied by an adult. Life jackets are available for all sizes. The skipper will brief everyone on safety procedures before departure.

faq.q: Can I charter a yacht for just 2 hours on NYE?
faq.a: Yes, 2-hour charters are available for the Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 (€749). For larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, the minimum is 4 hours (€4,719). All depart from Puerto Banús.

data.body_html:
Ring in 2029 with a New Year's Eve 2028 Marbella yacht fireworks charter from Puerto Banús. Watch the midnight sky explode over the Mediterranean from your private boat, with a glass of cava in hand and the Costa del Sol glittering behind you. Whether you want a quick 2-hour cruise or a 4-hour party at sea, our fleet has options from €749 for the Astondoa 40 to €4,719 for the Mangusta 80 (including a free jet ski). All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA — no surprises.

Why charter a yacht for New Year's Eve 2028 in Marbella?

Marbella's fireworks display is launched from the coastline near Puerto Banús and Marbella Marina, lighting up the bay. From a yacht, you get an unobstructed view with no crowds, no traffic jams, and no queuing for taxis. You control the music, the drinks, and the company. Plus, you can cruise along the Golden Mile or towards Cabopino before anchoring for the countdown.

Our fleet for New Year's Eve 2028

All boats depart from Puerto Banús. Here are the best options for your group size and budget:

BoatLengthMax PaxPrice (NYE)Notes
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h → €2,299/8hBest value for small groups
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2h → €2,299/8hIdeal for up to 11 guests
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719 min 4hIncludes free jet ski
Mangusta 80 (Grey)24m12€4,719 min 4hSame spec, different colour
Mangusta 80 (White)24m12€4,719 min 4hSame spec, different colour
Speedboat7m6On requestCompact, fast, fun
Ferretti 9429m12On requestSuperyacht luxury

For other boats (e.g. Azimut 58 Flybridge, Canados 86, Pershing 46), pricing is on request via WhatsApp. Contact us for a custom quote.

What's included in every New Year's Eve charter?

  • Licensed, English-speaking skipper
  • Fuel for the full charter duration
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava (for the toast)
  • Light snacks (chips, olives, nuts)
  • Insurance and safety equipment (life jackets, fire extinguisher, flares)
  • Spanish IVA (21%) — no hidden taxes

You can bring your own food, decorations, and party hats. Let us know if you need a cooler or extra ice.

Where do we watch the fireworks from?

Your skipper will anchor in the bay between Puerto Banús and Marbella Marina, offering a front-row seat to the midnight display. The fireworks are launched from the coastline near the Río Verde area, so you'll see the bursts reflecting on the water. After the show, you can cruise back to port with the city lights of the Golden Mile in the background.

How to book your New Year's Eve 2028 yacht charter

Slots fill quickly, especially for the Mangusta 80 and Astondoa 40. Contact us via WhatsApp (link on our site) to check availability and secure your booking. We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance.

For more ideas on exploring the coast, see our Boat Rental Marbella guide.

What if the weather is bad?

If the forecast shows unsafe conditions (high wind, rough seas), we will offer a full refund or reschedule to another date. We monitor the weather 48 hours before and will keep you informed. Safety is non-negotiable.

Tips for a perfect NYE on the water

  • Dress warmly: sea temperature drops to ~15°C in December, and wind chill makes it feel colder
  • Bring a camera or phone with night mode for the fireworks
  • Arrive 15 minutes early at Puerto Banús to board smoothly
  • If you want a longer cruise before the fireworks, book a 4-hour or 8-hour charter
  • Consider a sunset cruise (5–7 pm) before the main event

Frequently asked questions

What is the best yacht for New Year's Eve 2028 in Marbella?

For a small group, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) offer great value from €749/2h. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski and costs €4,719 for 4 hours. All depart from Puerto Banús.

Do you see the fireworks from the yacht?

Yes. The midnight fireworks over Marbella's coastline are clearly visible from the bay near Puerto Banús. Your skipper will anchor in a prime spot for unobstructed views of the display.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

How do I book a yacht for New Year's Eve 2028?

Contact us via WhatsApp (link on our site) to check availability and get a quote. We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance as NYE slots sell out quickly.

Can I bring my own food or decorations?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and decorations. The yacht has a cooler and table space. Just let us know in advance so we can prepare.

What happens if the weather is bad on New Year's Eve?

Safety comes first. If conditions are unsafe, we will offer a full refund or reschedule to another date. We monitor forecasts closely and inform you 24–48 hours before.

Is there a minimum age for children on the yacht?

No minimum age, but children must be accompanied by an adult. Life jackets are available for all sizes. The skipper will brief everyone on safety procedures before departure.

Can I charter a yacht for just 2 hours on NYE?

Yes, 2-hour charters are available for the Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 (€749). For larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, the minimum is 4 hours (€4,719). All depart from Puerto Banús.

Make this New Year's Eve unforgettable with a private yacht charter in Marbella. Browse our full fleet and book your spot today.
